perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a brown off-shoulder top stands in a Costco aisle, holding a large box of Garlic & Cheese Pull Apart Brioches and pointing at the packaging with excitement. (2) Close-up shots show the product inside the box through a plastic window, emphasizing its round, bun-like shape. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor room where two women sit at a table with the baked bread; they tear into the brioche pieces to show the interior. (4) Both women taste the bread, their expressions turning from neutral to visibly disappointed, culminating in thumbs-down gestures and shaking heads.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM plays. A female voice speaks excitedly about finding a new product at Costco, accompanied by occasional male interjections off-camera and ambient store chatter. (2) Music continues as the setting changes to a quiet room; voices become clearer. (3) The tone of the two female voices shifts to being critical and mocking as they describe the bread's texture and lack of flavor. (4) Sound effects such as a 'ding' and a disappointed 'uhoh' sound are used to punctuate their negative review.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout. (2) Hook Text: '不能只有我吃到！快分享！' (I can't be the only one to eat this! Share quickly!) in large purple and yellow font. (3) Decorative Text: '超級不好吃' (Super not delicious) in yellow/red impact font and '大蒜乾酪布里歐' (Garlic Cheese Brioche) labels. (4) Subtitles: Chronological transcription of the speakers discussing price (549元) and their disappointment.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store Intro -> Product Close-up -> Home Tasting -> Final Negative Verdict

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female hosts, approximately 2 blurred shoppers in the store background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a brown off-shoulder top; the second woman wears a similar top and a grey bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half features retail warehouse aisles with red product pallets; second half features a domestic room with a dining table and shelves.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a consumer 'anti-recommendation' or 'landmine warning' review. It starts with the hook of discovering a new, visually appealing bakery item at Costco, but the core objective is to inform viewers that the product's taste and quality do not match its appearance or price, ultimately advising them not to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The reviewers explicitly state the product is 'super not delicious' and use negative body language to discourage purchase.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-contrast text overlays and dramatic 'landmine' warnings.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the 'stepping on a landmine' (踩雷) trend where creators share negative experiences to build trust with their audience through honesty.
